name: agent-ping
description: Plays a sound when Claude finishes responding. Works in Cursor, Windsurf, and any Claude Code environment.

agentPing.enabled.description: Enable or disable Agent Ping entirely.

agentPing.questionDetection.description: Use smart question detection on Stop events to play a different sound when Claude is asking you something.

agentPing.stopSound.markdownDescription:
Path to a WAV, MP3, or AIFF (.aiff or .aif) sound file. Leave empty to use the bundled default.

[Choose file…](command:agentPing.chooseStopSound) · [Test sound](command:agentPing.testStopSound) · [Reset to default](command:agentPing.resetStopSound)

agentPing.notificationSound.markdownDescription:
Path to a WAV, MP3, or AIFF (.aiff or .aif) sound file. Leave empty to use the bundled default.

[Choose file…](command:agentPing.chooseNotificationSound) · [Test sound](command:agentPing.testNotificationSound) · [Reset to default](command:agentPing.resetNotificationSound)

agentPing.permissionSound.markdownDescription:
Path to a WAV, MP3, or AIFF (.aiff or .aif) sound file. Leave empty to use the bundled default.

[Choose file…](command:agentPing.choosePermissionSound) · [Test sound](command:agentPing.testPermissionSound) · [Reset to default](command:agentPing.resetPermissionSound)

agentPing.stopEnabled.description: Enable or disable the Stop event sound.

agentPing.notificationEnabled.description: Enable or disable the Notification event sound.

agentPing.permissionEnabled.description: Enable or disable the Permission event sound.

commands.title: Agent Ping: Reset Stop Sound to Default
Agent Ping: Reset Notification Sound to Default
Agent Ping: Reset Permission Sound to Default
